title: fix: bump components-contrib to v1.18.3 for CVE-2026-2303
body:
## Description

Master counterpart of the 1.18.2 CVE backport (#10205), so the fixes Fico requested also land on `master`.

The daprd binary on `master` already links the patched direct dependencies via #10188:
- `github.com/go-chi/chi/v5` v5.2.4 (CVE-2025-69725)
- `go.mongodb.org/mongo-driver` v1.17.7 (CVE-2026-2303)

This PR bumps `github.com/dapr/components-contrib` from v1.18.1 to v1.18.3, which carries the mongo-driver v1.17.7 fix (CVE-2026-2303) on the component side. `master` currently pins the 1.18 release line for components-contrib (v1.18.1), so this advances it to v1.18.3.

## Related

- Runtime CVE bumps already on master: #10188
- 1.18.2 backport: #10205
- components-contrib: #4453 (main), #4454 (release-1.18)

## Testing

- `go build ./...` — passes
- `go mod tidy` / `make modtidy-all` clean; `go.sum` consistent

files.patch:
@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@ require (
 	github.com/cenkalti/backoff/v4 v4.3.0
 	github.com/cloudevents/sdk-go/v2 v2.15.2
 	github.com/coreos/go-oidc/v3 v3.17.0
-	github.com/dapr/components-contrib v1.18.1
+	github.com/dapr/components-contrib v1.18.3
 	github.com/dapr/durabletask-go v0.12.2-0.20260630111707-26034a1c0eef
 	github.com/dapr/kit v0.18.2
 	github.com/diagridio/go-etcd-cron v0.12.6
